original_text:
### Accessibility (brand-mandated)
- Body copy **≥16px**; bigger is better.
- Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
- Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.
- Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.
- Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.
- Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop. **[GENERAL email]:** animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.
- Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.
- Reference standard: WCAG (wcag.com).

quotes: Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.

rules.intent: Maintain readable, hierarchically clear text across brand materials.
rules.rule_text: Body copy must be at least 16px, with larger type preferred where feasible. Line height must be at least 150%, with additional leading for light-on-dark text. Use a type scale to establish visual hierarchy.

quotes: Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.

rules.intent: Ensure text and meaning remain perceptible for users with visual or color-vision limitations.
rules.rule_text: Test contrast and proof all text for legibility. Never rely on color alone to convey meaning.

quotes: Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.

rules.intent: Keep form controls understandable and operable without relying on transient placeholder text or undersized targets.
rules.rule_text: Form labels must always remain visible: do not use placeholders as labels and do not allow labels to disappear. Form click/tap targets must meet the 48px minimum touch-target size.

quotes: no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback
Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop.
**[GENERAL email]:** animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.

rules.intent: Preserve message comprehension and user control across email clients and devices.
rules.rule_text: Use quick transitions that do not interrupt flow, avoid excessive motion, and provide a way to pause effects. Design animation for phone, tablet, and desktop. In general email, animated GIFs must place the key message in frame 1 because Outlook shows only the first frame; autoplaying motion longer than approximately 5 seconds requires a static fallback.

quotes: Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.

rules.intent: Provide equivalent access to visual and time-based media content.
rules.rule_text: All images must have descriptive alt text, and transcripts must be available for every video or audio asset. Use WCAG (wcag.com) as the reference standard.
